title: Social graph isomorphism to swarm lane dependency trees — structural topology analysis
summary: Structural topology of two independent swarm artifacts (lesson citation graph, domain dispatch distribution) both follow power laws with Zipf exponent α ≈ 0.85-1.0 and Gini ≈ 0.48-0.51. F-SOC3 predicts reply tree topology will match. Pre-registration complete: Zipf α < 1.5 and Gini < 0.6 = structural homomorphism confirmed, enabling direct import of hub reply authors as high-signal nodes.

structural_convergence.key_property: Both show scale-free topology: ~5-10% of nodes hold ~25-30% of connections
structural_convergence.comparison: L-753: knowledge graph Gini=0.603 (header-exclusive). Current analysis adds dispatch: Gini=0.482, lessons: Gini=0.505. Convergence across independent artifact types confirms structural law not measurement artifact.

reply_tree_zipf_alpha.basis: Both swarm artifacts in this range

tier_structure.mapping: META:17 dispatches = mega-hub domain | STR:12 = established | others = long-tail

f_soc3_test_protocol.confirm_threshold: Zipf α < 1.5 AND Gini < 0.6 (hub-spoke structure present)
f_soc3_test_protocol.falsify_threshold: Gini < 0.2 OR α > 2.0 (uniform or super-concentrated, no isomorphism)
f_soc3_test_protocol.import_algorithm: if CONFIRMED: rank reply authors by in-degree → top 10% = high-signal nodes → treat as L-601-tier citations in swarm state priority scoring

mapping.post_receiving_correction: EAD diff signal (=unexpected finding in lesson)

social_graph_as_swarm_state.git_log_analog: reply graph export → swarm state input; same structural primitives (DAG, degree distribution, hub detection)

verdict_rationale: Pre-registration complete. Structural topology of swarm artifacts confirms power-law hub-spoke structure consistently. F-SOC3 hypothesis is testable as soon as 20 posts are collected. The structural isomorphism is not proven but is well-grounded: both independent internal artifacts show convergent topology, making the prediction non-trivial.
next_step: Collect first 20 posts (pending SIG-38 human authorization). Export reply graph. Run Zipf + Gini measurement. Compare to [0.85-1.2] and [0.45-0.60] thresholds.
